TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Mette Frederiksen ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 11, Mette Frederiksen, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1977) mrhuw Denmark ta' misuw hya' ga Mette Frederiksen, aring ryax tay 27 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2019 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Mette Frederiksen minkahul sa Aalborg na Denmark. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1977 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun mette-frederiksen.dk
S.PHON: mette *re*eriks~…ēen rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, mette *re*eriks~…ēen, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw *enmark ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a mette *re*eriks~…ēen, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qjanux na s~…ēraral mette *re*eriks~…ēen minkańßul s~…ēa aalő≤or…£ na *enmark. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®anpjuta ńßknjun mette-*re*eriks~…ēen.*k
S.FORM: Mette Frederiksen ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 11, Mette Frederiksen, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1977) mrhuw Denmark ta' misuw hya' ga Mette Frederiksen, aring ryax tay 27 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2019 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Mette Frederiksen minkahul sa Aalborg na Denmark. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1977 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun mette-frederiksen.dk
